name: Continental Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 package (2-1/4 oz.) dried beef (I use Buddig beef)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the dried beef at the bottom of a greased crock pot.
2. Wrap each piece of boned chicken with a strip of bacon and place on top of the dried beef (I often don't use the bacon).
3. Mix together the soup and sour cream.
4. Pour the mixture over the chicken.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 9 hours, or High for 3 to 4 hours.
